title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and integration with Gemini Flash for UI design. The approach leverages each model's strengths: Opus for planning and backend work, Gemini for visual frontend generation. The workflow runs through design, integration, and deployment phases to produce polished frontends quickly.
